artPrompt: Western fantasy COMIC PAGE with PANEL GRID and white gutters. TOP wide panel: farmers, healers, and Keepers gather at dawn where stable Fracture paths intersect; mud flats. BOTTOM wide panel: cyan Riftstone rising from mud with a crack of light; courier Elara with glowing egg at center of the crowd. Thick black borders. Characters inside panels — NO floating fox card stickers, NO collage lore plates. Warm earth first, cyan on the stone only. Original Riftwilds IP. NO readable text, balloons, logos, or UI in the art.

lines.text: Farmers, healers, and Keepers gathered where stable paths still intersected.
